name: variant-systems-skills
description: Developer tools and agent skills by Variant Systems. Product engineering for founders.

plugins.name: code-audit
plugins.description: Automated code audit — intelligently selects the best tools for each project. Security, secrets, dependencies, test coverage, and more. Cross-platform. Zero dependencies baseline, enhanced by external tools.

plugins.name: postbox
plugins.description: Collect structured data, create forms, and set up submission endpoints. Covers contact, feedback, signup, waitlist, and any form type. Manages submissions, generates frontend integration code, configures webhooks, notifications, and spam protection via Postbox API.
